The '''Council on Security and Intelligence''' ('''CSI''') was a committee that provided strategic management of intelligence policy and advising on threats to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The council comprised seven members, at least five [[Senator/Legends|members]] of the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] and three [[New Republic Intelligence Service|intelligence]] or [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|military]] officials, and met in in [[Room 030]] of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]]. 

==History==
In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], members present during the discussion of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Teljkon expedition|response]] to the [[Teljkon Vagabond]] included senators [[Krall Praget]], [[Cair Tok Noimm]], [[Amamanam]] and [[Lillald]], as well as [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] of [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]].

In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] it consisted of six senators ([[Porolo Miatamia]], [[Krall Praget]], [[Gron Marrab]], [[Tolik Yar]], [[Ab'el Bogen]], and [[Viqi Shesh]]) as well as at least one intelligence officer, [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Belindi Kalenda]]. It was directly responsible for the secret agency [[Alpha Blue]].

As of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] it had been [[Security and Intelligence Council (Galactic Alliance)|re-established]] under the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].
